routes.title: EncouragingYou | Youth-led support in Rochdale
routes.h1: Build confidence, get practical help, and move forward.
routes.description: EncouragingYou offers Saturday CV support, youth club sessions, and welcoming community support in Rochdale.

routes.title: About | EncouragingYou
routes.h1: Youth-led leadership with practical care built in.
routes.description: Learn how EncouragingYou brings youth-led leadership, welcoming sessions, and practical support together in Rochdale.

routes.title: Sessions | EncouragingYou
routes.h1: Recurring offers that are easy to understand and easy to return to.
routes.description: See EncouragingYou's recurring Saturday sessions in Rochdale, including CV support and youth club.

routes.title: CV Support Session | EncouragingYou
routes.h1: CV support that is practical, calm, and one-to-one.
routes.description: Join EncouragingYou's Saturday CV support session in Rochdale for one-to-one help with CVs, applications, and next steps.

routes.title: Youth Club Session | EncouragingYou
routes.h1: Youth club built around welcome, friendship, and safe space.
routes.description: Join EncouragingYou's Saturday youth club in Rochdale for games, activities, and friendship in a positive, welcoming space.

routes.title: Get Involved | EncouragingYou
routes.h1: Support the work without a complicated first step.
routes.description: Volunteer with EncouragingYou, partner with the team, or ask about referrals and community support in Rochdale.

routes.title: Safeguarding | EncouragingYou
routes.h1: Separate child and adult safeguarding routes, explained plainly.
routes.description: Read EncouragingYou's safeguarding information, including separate routes for child and adult safeguarding concerns.

routes.title: Privacy | EncouragingYou
routes.h1: Short, readable, and linked at the point where people share information.
routes.description: Read EncouragingYou's simple privacy notice and cookie information.

responsibilities: Calculate next Saturday occurrences for two recurring sessions

Inject Event schema into the two session detail pages at runtime

derivedRuntimeContent: Next-session labels generated from the sessions object in source/blurpint/assets/js/site.js
Event JSON-LD injected client-side into the two session detail pages

notableIssues: Browser console captured a 404 for favicon.ico
The mobile home screenshot shows the full navigation stacking above the hero rather than using a dedicated mobile navigation pattern

observations: Navigation and footer markup are duplicated across every HTML route.
Only the home page carries explicit Open Graph tags, and only the home page carries Organization schema in source HTML.
Session detail pages reserve Event schema blocks, but the final JSON-LD is injected in the browser rather than generated at build time.
Contact and involvement flows currently depend on mailto links and mailto form submissions.
The prototype has no dedicated Contact page, Programmes overview, Events and Updates index, Volunteer page, Partner page, Accessibility Statement, Cookies page, Terms page, or custom 404 route.
